text.title: learning-speed-competitive-moat Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for learning-speed-competitive-moat as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Synthesizer generating insights at digest-of-digest-of-digest compression, losing original wording.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Re-grounding every synthesizer run on the raw events.ndjson is mandatory. Previous digests anchor on prior framing and lose the original signal over time.

failure-mode.description: Memory rot: belief-updater pulled into context-window compaction loses last week's reasoning.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Persist beliefs.yaml and beliefs.history.ndjson outside the LLM and re-inject on every run. Never rely on LLM memory for belief continuity across sessions.

failure-mode.description: Evidence laundering: sonnet rewrites the same event into 3 different "independent" supports for a belief.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dedupe by event_id hash before counting independent signals. Three occurrences of the same event do not count as three independent signals.

failure-mode.description: Prompt bias: "summarise this week's competitor wins" yields wins. Use neutral framing: "score evidence-based threat 1-5, default 1".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Leading prompts pre-load the model to find wins. Neutral framing with default scores prevents confirmation bias.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated event_ids: model invents event_42 that does not exist in events.ndjson.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a fact-checker pass that looks up every cited id in events.ndjson before publishing. Uncited event_ids are fabrications.

failure-mode.description: Token blow-up from dumping 10k events directly into Opus weekly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-cluster with haiku, hand 50–100 archetypal events to opus. Full event streams at opus cost is wasteful and counterproductively degrades reasoning quality.

failure-mode.description: Action-less insight loop: agent surfaces 200 insights per week, no decision_owner, nobody acts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force schema field decision_owner on every event that reaches the belief-updater. Drop events without an owner rather than surfacing them without action.

failure-mode.description: Auto-publishing risk: an agent-generated digest claiming a competitor is "in trouble" leaks via Slack screenshot.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a human review gate before any cross-org distribution. Agents should draft for internal consumption; humans approve before external sharing.

failure-mode.description: Calibration neglect: nobody scores last quarter's predictions, confidence weights become superstition.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Quarterly grading job is not optional. It is the feedback loop that prevents belief drift from reality.
